hero.home.headline: Trusted Roofing Solutions for Your Home
hero.home.subheading: Fast inspections, transparent pricing, backed by warranty. Your roof matters to us.
hero.storm.headline: Storm Damage? We're Here to Help
hero.storm.urgency_message: Same-day inspections available. Call now to document your damage for insurance.
cta_band.headline: Ready to Protect Your Home?
cta_band.subheading: Get a free inspection and discover your roof's true condition.
service.inspection.title: Roof Inspections
service.inspection.description: Comprehensive inspection to assess your roof's condition and identify repairs needed.
service.replacement.title: Roof Replacement
service.replacement.description: Full roof replacement with modern materials and manufacturer warranty protection.
service.repair.title: Roof Repairs
service.repair.description: Fast, reliable repairs to extend your roof's lifespan and prevent further damage.
service.maintenance.title: Maintenance Plans
service.maintenance.description: Proactive maintenance to keep your roof healthy and catch issues early.
material.asphalt.name: Asphalt Shingles
material.asphalt.use_case: Best for: Most residential homes. Cost-effective, widely available, proven performance.
material.metal.name: Metal Roofing
material.metal.use_case: Best for: Modern homes, commercial buildings. Durable, energy-efficient, premium aesthetic.
material.tile.name: Tile Roofing
material.tile.use_case: Best for: Luxury homes, warm climates. Timeless beauty, exceptional durability, premium cost.
financing.description.12_month: Spread payments over 12 months with no interest when approved. Fast application, instant approval.
warranty.title: Backed by Warranty Protection
warranty.copy: Every roof comes with a 20-year manufacturer warranty and our satisfaction guarantee.

testimonial.quote.1: Professional, fast, and thorough. They fixed our roof right and explained everything.
insurance.explainer.title: Insurance Claim Support
insurance.explainer.copy: We understand insurance claims can be confusing. We'll document your damage and work directly with your insurance company to ensure a smooth process.
